title: 「Nonetheless / Nevertheless」句型
titleEn: Using Nonetheless and Nevertheless for unexpected contrast

omissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules and Benefits explanations are faithful editorial translations.

example: The project was extremely difficult; nonetheless, they finished it on time.
exampleZh: 這個項目非常困難；儘管如此，他們仍然準時完成了。

examples.en: The project was extremely difficult; nonetheless, they finished it on time.
examples.zh: 這個項目非常困難；儘管如此，他們仍然準時完成了。

examples.en: There was little chance of success; nevertheless, he decided to try.
examples.zh: 成功的機會微乎其微；然而，他仍然決定嘗試。

meaning.zh: 這個句型先提出一項原本可能令人預期某個結果的事實，再說明實際結果卻不同。

rules.en: The two clauses must form an unexpected contrast: the first presents a difficulty, limit or disadvantage, while the second says that something still happened.
rules.zh: 前後必須形成出乎意料的對比：第一部分提出困難、限制或不利情況；第二部分說明事情仍然發生。
examples: The weather was terrible; nonetheless, the event continued.

rules.en: Nonetheless and nevertheless are connecting adverbs, not ordinary conjunctions. In this exercise, join the complete clauses with a semicolon and place a comma after the adverb.
rules.zh: Nonetheless 和 nevertheless 是連接副詞，不是普通連接詞。本練習使用「完整句；連接副詞，完整句」的標點，不能只用一個逗號連接兩個完整句子。
examples: The journey was long; nonetheless, we enjoyed it.

rules.en: Nonetheless and nevertheless have the same core meaning and are interchangeable in most sentences.
rules.zh: Nonetheless 和 nevertheless 的核心意思相同，都表示「儘管如此／然而」；大部分句子中可以互換。

rules.en: Nevertheless often sounds slightly more formal and emphatic; nonetheless is also formal but may sound more concise and neutral.
rules.zh: Nevertheless 通常稍為正式、慎重或強調；nonetheless 同樣較正式，但感覺較簡潔和中性。
examples: The evidence was limited; nonetheless, the team continued its investigation.
The evidence was limited; nevertheless, the team continued its investigation.

rules.en: Although and even though introduce a subordinate clause, whereas nonetheless and nevertheless connect two complete statements.
rules.zh: Although 和 even though 放在從句前；nonetheless 和 nevertheless 則連接兩個完整陳述，因此句式和標點不同。
examples: Although the task was difficult, we completed it.
The task was difficult; nonetheless, we completed it.

benefits.en: It clearly shows that a difficulty did not prevent the second result from happening.
benefits.zh: 這個句型能立即告訴讀者：第一項事實並沒有阻止第二項結果發生。

benefits.en: It connects two complete ideas more naturally and makes their contrast immediately clear.
benefits.zh: 你不需要把兩項資料寫成兩個毫無關係的短句；讀者可以立即看出兩個想法之間的對比。

benefits.en: It provides an alternative to repeatedly using but.
benefits.zh: 使用 nonetheless 或 nevertheless 可以增加句式變化，避免作文和說話過度重複 but。

benefits.en: It helps organise essays, reports and presentations by acknowledging a problem before stating a position that still holds.
benefits.zh: 這兩個詞適合先承認一項問題，再提出仍然成立的主要觀點，使論述更平衡和有組織。

benefits.en: It lets you acknowledge difficulties, limits or opposing evidence while maintaining your position.
benefits.zh: 你可以承認困難、限制或反面證據，同時保持原本立場，適合回應反對觀點或分析優缺點。

sourceOmissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules and Benefits explanations are faithful editorial translations.

en: Rewrite each sentence using nonetheless or nevertheless to show an unexpected contrast.
Use the punctuation pattern: Complete clause 1; nonetheless/nevertheless, complete clause 2.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 nonetheless 或 nevertheless 改寫以下句子，以表達出乎意料的對比。
請使用「第一個完整句子；nonetheless/nevertheless，第二個完整句子」的標點格式。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: Although the walk was long, we enjoyed it.
questions.promptZh: 雖然路程很長，但我們很享受這段旅程。
questions.answer: The walk was long; nonetheless, we enjoyed it.
questions.answerZh: 路程很長；儘管如此，我們仍然很享受這段旅程。
questions.highlight: The walk was long; nonetheless, we enjoyed it.

questions.promptZh: 雖然房間很小，但十分舒適。

questions.answerZh: 房間很小；然而，房間仍然十分舒適。
questions.highlight: The room was small; nevertheless, it was comfortable.

questions.prompt: Although the students who joined the project had different levels of experience, they worked effectively as one team.
questions.promptZh: 雖然參與項目的學生擁有不同程度的經驗，但他們仍然有效地合作成為一個團隊。
questions.answer: Students who joined the project had different levels of experience; nonetheless, they worked effectively as one team.
questions.answerZh: 參與項目的學生擁有不同程度的經驗；儘管如此，他們仍然有效地合作成為一個團隊。
questions.highlight: Students who joined the project had different levels of experience; nonetheless, they worked effectively as one team.

questions.prompt: Despite the heavy pressure on the public transport system during the holiday, most passengers reached their destinations safely.
questions.promptZh: 儘管假日期間公共交通系統承受很大壓力，但大部分乘客仍然安全到達目的地。
questions.answer: The public transport system was under heavy pressure during the holiday; nevertheless, most passengers reached their destinations safely.
questions.answerZh: 假日期間公共交通系統承受很大壓力；然而，大部分乘客仍然安全到達目的地。
questions.highlight: The public transport system was under heavy pressure during the holiday; nevertheless, most passengers reached their destinations safely.

questions.prompt: The charity could not solve every problem in the district, but its support made a meaningful difference to many residents.
questions.promptZh: 這間慈善機構無法解決區內所有問題，但它的支援仍然為很多居民帶來了實際幫助。
questions.answer: The charity could not solve every problem in the district; nonetheless, its support made a meaningful difference to many residents.
questions.answerZh: 這間慈善機構無法解決區內所有問題；儘管如此，它的支援仍然為很多居民帶來了實際幫助。
questions.highlight: The charity could not solve every problem in the district; nonetheless, its support made a meaningful difference to many residents.

questions.prompt: Although the plan involved considerable financial risk, the board approved it because the long-term benefits appeared greater.
questions.promptZh: 雖然這個計劃涉及相當大的財務風險，但董事會認為長遠利益較大，因此仍然批准了計劃。
questions.answer: The plan involved considerable financial risk; nevertheless, the board approved it because the long-term benefits appeared greater.
questions.answerZh: 這個計劃涉及相當大的財務風險；然而，董事會認為長遠利益較大，因此仍然批准了計劃。
questions.highlight: The plan involved considerable financial risk; nevertheless, the board approved it because the long-term benefits appeared greater.
